subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1916-05-05 in Akka
subcodes.first_line: Man should know his worth and ever be thankful. Mirza Aqa Jan was a soap-maker who attained to faith in Kashan [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انسان باید قدر بداند و همیشه شاکر باشد.  میرزا آقا جان صابون ساز بود در کاشان مؤمن شد
subcodes.subjects: @pride; vanity; laying claim to inner knowledge, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis
